parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: fieldattrscope
parameters.label: Field Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Determines the scope of the attribute used to output the weight.

parameters.name: specpop
parameters.label: Specification POP
parameters.description: to a where each point is a specification defining a separate field.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: Select the shape of the field.

parameters.name: height
parameters.label: Height
parameters.description: The height of the tube.

parameters.name: roundness
parameters.label: Roundness
parameters.description: Roundness factor for rounded fields modes.

parameters.name: exponent
parameters.label: Exponent
parameters.description: Sets the exponent on parabola fields.

parameters.name: transitionrange
parameters.label: Transition Range
parameters.description: Determines a transition range for weights.

parameters.name: transitionalign
parameters.label: Transition Align
parameters.description: Determines a transition offset for weights.

parameters.name: transitiontype
parameters.label: Transition Type
parameters.description: Determines a transition function for weights.

parameters.name: absvalue
parameters.label: Absolute Value
parameters.description: Enable using the absolute value on the transitioned weight.

parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Invert the attribute value resulting from the field.

parameters.name: deletezeros
parameters.label: Delete Zeros
parameters.description: Enable removal of points with weigth zero.

parameters.name: linestripbehavior
parameters.label: Line Strip Behavior
parameters.description: What to do when points of a line strip are deleted.

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.label: Weight
parameters.description: Output a field weight attribute.

parameters.name: signeddistance
parameters.label: Signed Distance
parameters.description: Output a signed distance attribute for each point.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: sdattrnumcomps
parameters.label: Sdattrnumcomps
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attrnumcomps
parameters.label: Attrnumcomps
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.label: Attrtype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.label: Sdattrdefaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
